title: seseli elatum subsp. farrenyi
intro: Seseli elatum subsp. farrenyi, also known as Farren's Seseli or Mountain Fern, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, due to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Seseli elatum subsp. farrenyi include its ability to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory disorders, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Seseli elatum subsp. farrenyi is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
